scripts.test-links: npm run bddge && cross-env REPORT_DIR=reports/links npx playwright test --grep @links --project=chromium
scripts.vrt-update: npm run bddge && cross-env REPORT_DIR=reports/vrt npx playwright test --grep @vrt --update-snapshots --project=update-snapshots
scripts.vrt-test: npm run bddge && cross-env REPORT_DIR=reports/vrt npx playwright test --grep @vrt --project=chromium
scripts.a11y-test: npm run bddge && cross-env REPORT_DIR=reports/a11y npx playwright test --grep @a11y --project=chromium
scripts.redirect-test: npm run bddge && cross-env REPORT_DIR=reports/redirects npx playwright test --grep @redirects --project=chromium
